name: Pizza Stuffed Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove stems from mushrooms and chop them. Set the mushrooms and stems aside.
2. In a 10-inch skillet over medium heat, cook the sausage until well browned. Using a slotted spoon, remove the sausage and drain on paper towels. Spoon out all but 2 tablespoons of drippings into the skillet.
3. In hot drippings in the skillet over medium heat, cook mushroom stems for about 10 minutes. During the last 3 minutes, add the pepperoni.
4. Remove the skillet from heat. Stir in the sausage, cheese, and crumbs.
5. Preheat oven to 450 degrees Fahrenheit. Fill mushroom caps with the sausage mixture and place them in an oven-safe dish. Bake for 15 minutes.
Variations:
Add chopped onions, chopped green peppers, bacon bits, or any other ingredients you like on your pizzas.
